title: Software Tools and Techniques for AI
text: Instructor: Dr. Nipun Batra, Sustainability Lab Credits: L1.5 T0 P3 C4

title: Software Tools and Techniques for AI
text:
Overview
This course covers the complete software engineering stack for modern AI development. While most ML courses focus on algorithms, this course focuses on the engineering practices that make ML systems work in the real world—from data collection to production deployment.

title: Software Tools and Techniques for AI
text:
Learning Outcomes
By the end of this course, you will:

Build end-to-end ML systems — From data collection to production deployment
Choose the right tools — Know which tool to use for any data/ML task
Write production code — Code that others can understand, maintain, and reproduce

title: Software Tools and Techniques for AI
text:
Course Structure (15 Weeks)








Part
Weeks
Topics




Data Engineering
1–5
Data collection, validation, labeling, augmentation


Model Development
6–11
LLM APIs, training, reproducibility, deployment, CI/CD


Production
12–15
Edge deployment, profiling, monitoring

title: Software Tools and Techniques for AI
text:
Prerequisites

Required: ES112 (Computing)
Preferred: Basic ML concepts
